title: Aureline template / generator descriptor record
description: Seed schema for the signed template / generator descriptor every starter / scaffold surface, command-palette generator row, generator-preview sheet, AI-assisted generation path, extension-provided generator, and CLI / headless creation path reads when it names **what signed template or generator is being used**, **which ecosystems / archetypes it supports**, **which parameters it requires**, **which files / hooks / validation tasks it declares**, and **which trust / egress / policy expectations and provenance it carries**, before any scaffold plan resolves or any file is written. One record per descriptor; surfaces read the record by id and never mint a parallel stable id for the same template / generator. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw remote URLs, raw template bytes, and raw generated file content never appear. AI-assisted and extension-provided generation are first-class providers, not a privileged bypass: they carry the same descriptor and reuse the same governed scaffold-plan / diff-review surface. Adding a new provider_class, signature_state, generation_kind, parameter_kind, hook_trigger_class, hook_execution_class, validation_task_class, trust_expectation_class, egress_posture_class, policy_constraint_class, or source_distribution_class is additive-minor and bumps template_generator_descriptor_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking. Companion contracts: /schemas/workspace/scaffold_plan.schema.json (the plan that scaffolds from this descriptor) and /schemas/workspace/scaffold_run.schema.json (the run record the plan produces).

template_generator_descriptor_schema_ver.description: Integer schema version for the descriptor payload shape. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump it.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in support bundles and claim manifests. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw URLs, and raw bytes never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: Producer-local monotonic timestamp. Opaque to this schema.

redaction_aware_text.description: Redaction-aware free text (<= 1024 graphemes). The exporter applies the redaction policy before the value crosses the boundary.

fixture_metadata.description: Optional worked-example prelude carried on fixtures. Ignored by the boundary contract.

provider_class.description: Closed provider-class set. Names who authored and ships the template or generator. 'ai_assisted' and 'extension_provided' are first-class providers, not a bypass: their generation reuses the same governed scaffold-plan / diff-review surface.

signature_state.description: Closed signature-state set. A surface that renders a non-'signed_verified' descriptor as fully trusted is non-conforming.

generation_kind.description: Closed generation-kind set. Names what the descriptor produces.

parameter_kind.description: Closed parameter-kind set. 'secret_handle' carries an opaque handle, never a raw secret.

hook_trigger_class.description: Closed hook-trigger set. Names when a declared hook would run.

hook_execution_class.description: Closed hook-execution set. Names what running a declared hook costs.

validation_task_class.description: Closed validation-task class set the descriptor declares.

trust_expectation_class.description: Closed trust-expectation set. Names the trust level the descriptor asks the workspace to grant before generation.

egress_posture_class.description: Closed egress-posture set. Names what network egress the descriptor expects during generation and setup.

policy_constraint_class.description: Closed policy-constraint set the descriptor advertises.

source_distribution_class.description: Closed source-distribution set. Names how the descriptor reached the workspace.

descriptor_parameter.description: One required-parameter declaration. The scaffold plan resolves each parameter and discloses its source.

declared_hook.description: One declared hook. A scaffold run may invoke only hooks that appear here; an undeclared hook is rejected at projection time.

declared_validation_task.description: One declared validation task. The plan may schedule only declared tasks; an undeclared task is rejected at projection time.

descriptor_provenance.description: Typed provenance block. Names the producer, source distribution, and a provenance attestation ref. Raw bytes never appear.

supported_ecosystems.description: Closed-by-convention list of supported ecosystem labels.

template_generator_descriptor_record.description: One template / generator descriptor record. Emitted by every surface that identifies a template or generator before a scaffold plan resolves: Start Center starter rows, command-palette generator rows, the generator-preview sheet, AI-assisted generation, extension-provided generators, and CLI / headless creation. Surfaces read the record by id; they do not re-derive provenance.
